title: On-call maintenance number appears inconsistent in source
summary: The source lists one maintenance number in the admin contacts section and a different number in the malfunctioning equipment section.
source_note: Contacts section shows 502-698-3117, while malfunctioning equipment section shows 502-974-2582.
recommended_resolution: Confirm the live on-call maintenance number and keep only one primary number in staff-facing UI.

title: Medication drop-off instruction appears person-specific / outdated
summary: Hospital-return workflow includes a person-specific desk instruction that should be replaced with a durable secure-location instruction.
source_note: Source references placing medication in a lock box or on Lori Hatcher's desk.
recommended_resolution: Replace with an admin-configured secure medication drop-off location.

title: Naming and spelling should be normalized for staff-facing UI
summary: The source contains multiple inconsistent labels and spelling issues that should be cleaned in the UI while preserving original source notes in admin.
source_note: Examples include ASA / AWOL, on-call therapist vs clinical on-call, shift supervisor vs supervisor on call, and spelling inconsistencies.
recommended_resolution: Use normalized UI labels and preserve original wording in admin notes only.
